requirements_met: Idempotent content-hash upsert with no-op for identical content
Batch write with within-batch duplicate collapsing
Content field for embed-on-write via store index config
Versioned update advancing version by one for changed content
Namespace validation before any store operation
Deterministic UUIDv5 identity from natural key
validation_results.test_output_summary: 17 passed in 0.21s - all acceptance criteria covered by independent test verification
validation_results.code_quality: All files pass ruff lint checks with zero errors
edge_cases_covered: Empty batch write produces zero records
Within-batch duplicate natural keys collapse to last occurrence
Byte-identical payloads detected via canonical JSON hash
Unregistered payload type rejected with clear error
Embedding errors propagate without partial writes

Independent test test_hyphenated_project_namespace_rejected PASSED - validation rejects hyphens before write attempt
Independent test test_non_registered_payload_rejected PASSED - registry check produces correct error message

rationale: All 12 acceptance criteria independently verified through deterministic test execution (17/17 tests passed). No critical absence-of-failure guards triggered. Honesty verification perfect (1.0 score, zero discrepancies). Quality gates all passed. Evidence bundle gathering completed successfully. The implementation delivers idempotent content-hash upsert with comprehensive edge case coverage including batch collapsing, namespace validation, registry checks, and error propagation. One non-blocking advisory about missing specialist agent invocation does not affect technical correctness.
